# Contributing guide

First off, thank you for taking the time to contribute!

## Have a question?

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out:

- Join our community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/ABaPnm7fDC) for
  general chat and Q&A.
- Alternatively, you can [start a discussion on
  GitHub](https://github.com/skrub-data/skrub/discussions).


## How can I contribute?

You can find the [contributing guide](https://skrub-data.org/stable/CONTRIBUTING.html) on the website.
